title: Slab-built hanging wall planter
notes: Wall-mounted planter with a flat back (for hanging) and curved front pocket for a small plant pot. The back slab has two pierced holes for cord or nails. Front pocket is a D-shaped slab curved around a jar or bottle. Approximately 150 mm wide, 120 mm tall, 80 mm deep. Drainage is via a small plastic liner pot inside. PVA sealed on the interior. Incised or stamped decoration on the front.
